data.body: GROUNDING EXPERIMENTS settled (Joe: settle each candidate w/ initial opinion + document bright line). Per-candidate single-turn-vs-agentic on rebar+snap: T10->AGENT (STRONG: agent found a real committed HMAC secret in a zip ST missed); T11->AGENT (analogy to T10, UNTESTED - no real migration in corpus, flag eval); T5a/T5b/T5e/T9/T4 KEPT single-turn (verdict plan-text-evident, grounding non-decisive; T5a was FAIL->AMBIGUOUS ambiguous, T5b FAIL=FAIL plan-evident; T5a/T5b flagged borderline). Final AGENT tier = E4/G1G2/A1/G6/T8/T1/T3/T5c/T10/T11. REFINED BRIGHT LINE (2 ways agent-tier: assertion-grounding E4/G1G2/A1 + implication-grounding where the verdict depends on actual code; test: 'could the plan look fine but code be broken, or vice versa?') documented in 6f2d WS-DOC + 5fd2 note. criteria_v8+guard+three_pass updated; guard passes; commit. NEXT: run epic through another full review cycle (Joe).
